title: SereneLife Plastic Hangers 100 pcs, Non-Slip Heavy Duty Clothes Hanger Set with 360° Swivel Hook, Smooth Finish to Protect Fabric, Lightweight, Ultra-Thin Hangers for Coats and Other Clothes (Pink)
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: STURDY AND DURABLE DESIGN - The SereneLife 100 Pcs. pink plastic hangers are built to last with a sturdy and durable construction. These heavy-duty coat hangers can support up to 5.5 lbs each, ensuring your clothes stay neatly in place.

PLASTIC NON-SLIP HANGERS - With a smooth finish, these non-slip hangers prevent clothes from snagging, pilling, over-stretching, and falling off. The 360° swivel hook allows for easy access, making these hangers perfect for daily use.

ORGANIZED & ELEGANT CLOSET - These lightweight plastic hangers keep your clothes neat and crease-free, adding a touch of elegance to your closet. The stylish design enhances your wardrobe for a sophisticated solution for all hanging needs.

SPACE SAVING AND ULTRA-THIN - Maximize your closet space with these space-saving Ivory closet hangers. These 0.24" ultra-thin hangers take up minimal space providing maximum hanging efficiency. Perfect for anyone looking to organize efficiently.

HEAVY DUTY HANGERS - Each hanger measures 16.5" x 0.24" x 8.66" inches and can support up to 5.5 lbs. Made from recycled ABS and metal hooks, these lightweight hangers combine durability with a sleek design for long-lasting use and practicality.

Almost Perfect for All Occasions, such as Birthday, Wedding, Christening, Valentines' Day, Christmas and even for DIY craft project.
